assignments.target: Confirm dispatch boundaries and runtime scope before any execution.
assignments.why_big_module: Architecture gating prevents parallel work from crossing runtime, paper, or governance boundaries.
provides_interface_contracts: Worker final report format from active objective
assignments.main_flow_to_connect: Gate 0 preflight -> dispatch plan -> reviewer-safe task pool.
assignments.real_functionality_required: Produce real local evidence, not mock completion or verbal readiness.
tests_or_probes_required: read-only report plus cited file/line evidence
required_verification_commands: read-only report plus cited file/line evidence
assignments.quality_standard: P0/P1 zero; P2 documented with evidence; no external runtime execution.
assignments.completion_standard: Report includes verdict, changed files, tests run, artifacts, known gaps, and suggested review focus.
governance_record_requirements: Report path must be referenced by Integrator before governance docs change.

task_spec.title: Review multi-agent architecture boundaries
task_spec.description: Check module boundaries, interface contracts, and forbidden cross-runtime execution paths before dispatch.
assumptions: Current Gate 0 preflight may remain HUMAN_REQUIRED.
Worker must not execute opencode, live CDP, cross-repo smoke, or paper workflow without separate human authorization.
task_spec.risk_notes: No external runtime execution is authorized by this TaskSpec.

gate_0.trigger_reason: Multi-agent dispatch plan introduces executable worker boundaries.
gate_0.delta_justification: Existing TaskSpec covers per-task boundaries, but the pilot needs a batch-level assignment packet and conflict check before human-gated dispatch.

assignments.target: Run the narrow local checks that prove current readiness state.
assignments.why_big_module: Verification is the evidence source for deciding whether HUMAN_REQUIRED is the only remaining gate.
provides_interface_contracts: Worker final report format from active objective
assignments.main_flow_to_connect: Registry validation -> Gate 0 preflight -> execution guard tests.
assignments.real_functionality_required: Produce real local evidence, not mock completion or verbal readiness.
tests_or_probes_required: python -m pytest tests\test_multi_agent_gate0_preflight.py tests\test_conversation_registry.py tests\test_cross_repo_execution_guards.py tests\test_smoke_suite.py -q
required_verification_commands: python -m pytest tests\test_multi_agent_gate0_preflight.py tests\test_conversation_registry.py tests\test_cross_repo_execution_guards.py tests\test_smoke_suite.py -q
assignments.quality_standard: P0/P1 zero; P2 documented with evidence; no external runtime execution.
assignments.completion_standard: Report includes verdict, changed files, tests run, artifacts, known gaps, and suggested review focus.
governance_record_requirements: Verifier report must include command, exit code, and output summary.

provides_interface_contracts: Worker final report format from active objective

assignments.real_functionality_required: Produce real local evidence, not mock completion or verbal readiness.

required_verification_commands: read-only code review with P0/P1/P2 findings
assignments.quality_standard: P0/P1 zero; P2 documented with evidence; no external runtime execution.
assignments.completion_standard: Report includes verdict, changed files, tests run, artifacts, known gaps, and suggested review focus.

assignments.target: Serially fold accepted first-wave reports into governance docs.
assignments.why_big_module: Integrator is the controlled write point for shared governance docs.
provides_interface_contracts: Worker final report format from active objective
assignments.main_flow_to_connect: Reviewer/verifier reports -> governance logs -> next dispatch wave.
assignments.real_functionality_required: Produce real local evidence, not mock completion or verbal readiness.
assignments.quality_standard: P0/P1 zero; P2 documented with evidence; no external runtime execution.
assignments.completion_standard: Report includes verdict, changed files, tests run, artifacts, known gaps, and suggested review focus.
blocking_conditions: Shared governance docs changed by another active worker
governance_record_requirements: Update progress, verify matrix, risk/debt if and only if backed by report evidence.

task_spec.title: Integrate first-wave reports into governance docs
task_spec.description: Serially reconcile reviewer/verifier outputs and update governance state after first-wave local reports exist.
assumptions: Current Gate 0 preflight may remain HUMAN_REQUIRED.
Worker must not execute opencode, live CDP, cross-repo smoke, or paper workflow without separate human authorization.
task_spec.risk_notes: Integrator writes shared governance docs and must run serially after report tasks finish.

gate_0.trigger_reason: Multi-agent dispatch plan introduces executable worker boundaries.
gate_0.delta_justification: Existing TaskSpec covers per-task boundaries, but the pilot needs a batch-level assignment packet and conflict check before human-gated dispatch.

assignments.target: Provide real independent agent/conversation binding evidence.
assignments.why_big_module: The pilot cannot be real multi-agent without independent conversation bindings.
provides_interface_contracts: Worker final report format from active objective
assignments.main_flow_to_connect: Manual binding evidence -> Gate 0 PASS candidate.
assignments.real_functionality_required: Produce real local evidence, not mock completion or verbal readiness.
assignments.quality_standard: P0/P1 zero; P2 documented with evidence; no external runtime execution.
assignments.completion_standard: Report includes verdict, changed files, tests run, artifacts, known gaps, and suggested review focus.
governance_record_requirements: Decision log must record source of binding evidence without secrets.

task_spec.title: Record independent conversation binding evidence
task_spec.description: Human-gated activation task for replacing pending manual bindings with verified independent conversation evidence.
assumptions: Current Gate 0 preflight may remain HUMAN_REQUIRED.
Worker must not execute opencode, live CDP, cross-repo smoke, or paper workflow without separate human authorization.
task_spec.risk_notes: Requires human-provided independent binding evidence; do not fabricate chat_url or conversation_id; avoid last-message-only capture.

gate_0.trigger_reason: Multi-agent dispatch plan introduces executable worker boundaries.
gate_0.delta_justification: Existing TaskSpec covers per-task boundaries, but the pilot needs a batch-level assignment packet and conflict check before human-gated dispatch.

assignments.target: Decide whether dev-frame-opencode dispatch can become executable.
assignments.why_big_module: Execution approval changes the runtime authority boundary for real dispatch.
provides_interface_contracts: Worker final report format from active objective
assignments.main_flow_to_connect: Capability approval -> Gate 0 PASS candidate -> real dispatch.
assignments.real_functionality_required: Produce real local evidence, not mock completion or verbal readiness.

task_spec.title: Review CAP-029 execution approval
task_spec.description: Human/reviewer-gated task for deciding whether dev-frame-opencode dispatch may become execution-usable.
assumptions: Current Gate 0 preflight may remain HUMAN_REQUIRED.
Worker must not execute opencode, live CDP, cross-repo smoke, or paper workflow without separate human authorization.
task_spec.risk_notes: Requires human/reviewer approval before usable_for_execution can change. Must not execute opencode run or cross-repo smoke without separate human authorization; tool-policy weakening requires review.

gate_0.trigger_reason: Multi-agent dispatch plan introduces executable worker boundaries.
gate_0.delta_justification: Existing TaskSpec covers per-task boundaries, but the pilot needs a batch-level assignment packet and conflict check before human-gated dispatch.
